design_philosophy.core_loop: Select and compete in winter sports minigames with progression through event variety and multiplayer competition
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Execution skill in timed sports events against AI or competing players; mastery of distinct control schemes per minigame
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Compete as a winter sports athlete across diverse disciplines (halfpipe snowboarding, sledding, aerial skiing, downhill racing, snowball combat)
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Minigame anthology design prioritizes breadth of winter sports experiences over narrative depth; emphasizes multiplayer hotseat competition as primary engagement; each event demands distinct skill mastery rather than unified mechanics

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Multiplayer hotseat format allows competitive player-vs-player difficulty scaling; sequential event mode tests consistency across varied disciplines

progression.unlock_mechanism: Five minigames available for individual selection or sequential tournament play
replayability_hooks: Up to six players hotseat multiplayer competition in four minigames
Distinct minigame mechanics require separate skill mastery per event
Sequential tournament mode chains events for consistent challenge
Semi-hotseat support in one minigame for alternating two-player gameplay

world_building_techniques: Shopkeeper character representation (Rodney Dangerfield) provides personality/flavor
Winter sports setting establishes thematic cohesion across minigames

sources_used: Wikipedia: Ski or Die - gameplay structure, minigame list, multiplayer modes, character details
The Cutting Room Floor: Developer/publisher information, platform confirmation
